textPlain:
For any stamp collectors here, the Isle of Man Post Office [1] has just issued an official set of 6 Roger Dean and Rick Wakeman stamps [2]:[1] https://iomstamps.com/collections/wakeman
[2] https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/articles/clyqe679gqno
YEARS ago some of his paintings were on display somewhere in San Francisco -- Red Dragon and Blue Desert (ABWH) and maybe Relayer. So great to see up close and in person.
This was way more in depth an interview than I expected, I liked the interviewers’ enthusiasm. Also: Roger Dean did the Tetris logo?!

I loved this Sci Fi artwork ever since high school in the '70s.I didn't know it from video games, but from the albums by the band Yes.Especially Yes - Relayer. Spectacular futuristic images.This inspired me to purchase the book, Views. This really expanded my understanding of his work. I especially loved his concepts of organic living spaces.I had always wondered what happened to him, and I guess the answer is that he started working on video game art.I've never seen any of that, but I wonder how well animation serves his orginal art. Especially in low resolution early games.
